lines.speaker: Patchy
lines.text: Hello there! Can I sew ye somethin' tegether?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: Patchy
lines.text: Well, ye see it works like this: I can sew yer eye patches onto yer pirate hats or pirate bandanas. Just pirate bandanas mind ye, I hate the feel of snakeskin.

lines.speaker: Patchy
lines.text: I also sew crab claw gauntlets on to pirate hooks, highwayman masks to black cavaliers, mime masks to black berets, partyhats to glasses and monocles to top hats.

lines.speaker: Patchy
lines.text: If ye also have some flippers and suitably evil lookin' claws, I can probably put them together too.

lines.speaker: Patchy
lines.text: It costs 500 coins te do it, and 600 coins te get them separated again afterwards if ye change yer mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why does it cost more to get them separated again?

lines.speaker: Patchy
lines.text: Wear and tear on scissors. So, do ye have anything ye wants doin?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let me see what you can do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, thank you.

lines.speaker: Patchy
lines.text: Fair enough. See you around!

lines.speaker: Patchy
lines.text: Hello there! Can I sew ye somethin' tegether?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: Patchy
lines.text: Well, ye see it works like this; I can sew yer eye patches onto yer pirate hats or pirate bandanas.

lines.speaker: Patchy
lines.text: Just pirate bandanas mind ye, I hate the feel of snakeskin. (Shudder)

lines.speaker: Patchy
lines.text: It costs 500 gold te do it, and 600 gold te get them separated.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, why does it cost more to get them separated than put together?

lines.speaker: Patchy
lines.text: Wear and tear on scissors.

lines.speaker: Patchy
lines.text: On another note, I also sew crab claw gauntlets on to pirate hooks, highwayman masks to black cavaliers, mime masks to black berets, partyhats to glasses and monocles to top hats if ye have them with ye.

lines.speaker: Patchy
lines.text: If ye also have some flippers and suitably evil lookin' claws, I can probably put them together too.

lines.speaker: Patchy
lines.text: So, do ye have anything ye wants doin?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Patchy
lines.text: Sure, but remember I charge 500 coins, so if you don't have them you'll have to come back later!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Patchy
lines.text: Fair enough. See you around!
